creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
Exiting the konqueror terminal window causes konqueror to crash.

Fix: 

None yet. I will rebuild with debug enabled and post a stack backtrace.
How-To-Repeat: Open the konqueror terminal emulator (*not* a separate terminal window). I
did this by adding the "Show Terminal Emulator" button to the Extra Toolbar.

Now, type ^D or exit in the terminal emulator frame. *Blammo*.
